form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 5th (Fr4) over 1609m at Menangle was 6th-15.47 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Senses (1:52.30) in NR up to 60 M on March 31 at $41. At the run before 6th (Sr4) over 1720m after racing wide at this track, beaten 30 m by Lookin Good Margie (2:03.80) in NR up to 53 on March 26 at $6.50. Can play a role from the ace draw.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Last start 5th (Fr6) over 1609m after showing early speed at Menangle, at the bell was 2nd-2.7 beaten 6 m by Myth You Already (1:53.40) in 3yo+ 2LTW so eligible 3yo+ NR55 on March 24 at $5.50. The run previous 7th (Fr2) over 1730m after showing early speed at Bathurst, at the bell was 4th-6.69 beaten 5 m by Daniboy (2:04.20) in NR up to 60 on March 18 at $4. Looks better placed.

form.formComment: Capable of better than what we have seen in two runs this prep. Two starts back 7th (Fr5) over 1609m after being wide early at Newcastle, at the bell was 2nd-0.56 beaten 16 m by Quickshift Girl (1:55.50) in NR up to 50 on March 19 at $6. Prefer to see him perform well before recommending.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 50m became unbalanced and broke gait.
Passing the 300m momentarily locked wheels with Playa Blanca.
Over raced for some distance during the middle stages.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into sixth behind Marty The Martian at Redcliffe over 2040m in a 3yo+ NR 54 to 62 on March 26 at $16. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Welease Woddewick at Redcliffe over 1780m in a 3yo+ NR 53 to 59 on April 1 at $3.50. Consider.
